tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij poniższe zdania (1.1.–1.10.), wybierając właściwy wariant odpowiedzi. Zakreśl literę A, B albo C.

items.stem: She is very good _______ playing the piano.
I'm not interested _______ watching horror films.
He apologised _______ being late to the meeting.
The town is famous _______ its beautiful castle.
We arrived _______ the airport just in time.
She has been waiting _______ the bus for half an hour.
He depends _______ his parents for financial support.
I'm fed up _______ doing the same thing every day.
She complained _______ the noise from the neighbours.
